          Stacey Brown
          January 28, 2026 at 8:01 PM
          To: supportView Details
          The tracking as I attached showed it is not delivered so unless you have different tracking numbers I am confused by what you are seeing. Did you see the one I posted?  Sent from my iPhone On Jan 28, 2026, at 9:29 AM, Poshmark Support <support@poshmark.com> wrote: ﻿ Hi Stacey, Thanks for reaching out! I am sorry to hear you have not received your order, “696eb9647a89c80ea3d94875.” According to the tracking status, the order was delivered on 1/27. Can you please check around your house and with your neighbors or mail carrier to see if it can be located? If it can’t be located, rest assured we have a process in place to assist you. Please let me know on 1/31 if you do not receive your order by replying to this email on that date. You can find the tracking information here: https://www.canadapost-postescanada.ca/track-reperage/en#/details/1026167712981159 <https://www.canadapost-postescanada.ca/track-reperage/en#/details/1026167712981159> I appreciate your patience!   Best, Amber Poshmark Community Team This message was sent to staceywlu@hotmail.com in reference to Case #: 114050678. Copyright © 2022 Poshmark, Inc. 203 Redwood Shores Pkwy, 8th Floor, Redwood City, CA 94065 Privacy Terms

          Amber Henderson
          January 28, 2026 at 7:59 PM
          To: Stacey RondinelliView Details
          Hi Stacey, Thanks for reaching out! I am sorry to hear you have not received your order, “696eb9647a89c80ea3d94875.” According to the tracking status, the order was delivered on 1/27. Can you please check around your house and with your neighbors or mail carrier to see if it can be located? If it can’t be located, rest assured we have a process in place to assist you. Please let me know on 1/31 if you do not receive your order by replying to this email on that date. You can find the tracking information here: https://www.canadapost-postescanada.ca/track-reperage/en#/details/1026167712981159 <https://www.canadapost-postescanada.ca/track-reperage/en#/details/1026167712981159> I appreciate your patience!   Best, Amber Poshmark Community Team This message was sent to staceywlu@hotmail.com <> in reference to Case #: 114050678.         Just so you know

        Information that you submit to the guidance panel can sometimes be transmitted to Trailhead, which is hosted outside your Salesforce org and subject to separate terms and conditions between you and Salesforce. If you have an existing Trailhead account associated with your work email, your in-progress and completed badges can sometimes be included.
